titleStmt.title: SII 30.138: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 138. (A.R. No. 216 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷiśvara temple-on the west and south walls Rājarāja-Chōḻa I: year 29 day 10: 1014 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the introduction, ‘tirumagaḷ pōla’ etc. It records a gift of 90 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp by Tiruppōndai of Paṟiyalūr, one of the members of the āḷuṅgaṇam of Rajamallach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. A shepherd of this village received the gift and agreed to supply ghee daily to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac ce
lviyun taṉakkey Urimaipūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷurc cālai kalama
ṟuttaruḷiy veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampa pāṭiyum
taṭikai pāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamum(ṅ) kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻama
ṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ilakkamum(n) tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ ko
ṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷaruḻi Ūḻiūḻi Ellā(vi) yāṇṭun toḻutakai
y viḷaṅku miyāṇṭey ceḻiñarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarājake
cari panmarāṉa śrīrājarājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu Irupattonpatāvatu koṭṭa
[nāḷ pattu jaya]ṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu tāmark koṭṭattut tiruve
raikkoṭṭu brahmad[eya]mā ti maṅkalattu śrī(ri)yāḷuṅga
ṇattāruḷ paṟiyalūr tiruppontaic cantirādityar Uḷḷaḷavum Oru tiru nu
ntā viḷakku Erikkavaitta Āṭu toṇṇūṟu Itu cāvā muvā
nicata niṉṟānāl Uḻakku neyyaṭṭak kaṭavānāka tillaic � Irukkum
Amarāyan Araṇiliyāṉa tiruppontai maṉṟāṭi varumāka � Ittanma
m rakṣippār śrīpātam En talai melana .
Digital edition of SII 30.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
